# @dlbcodes/my-design-system

> An accessible, tokenized Vue 3 component library built on Tailwind CSS v4,
> class-variance-authority, and Headless UI. Components are compound and
> composable (Trigger/Content patterns), themed entirely through semantic
> design tokens. Published on npm as @dlbcodes/my-design-system.

## Getting Started

- [Getting Started](https://YOUR_DOCS_URL/guide/getting-started): Install, Tailwind v4 setup, and first usage.
- [Theming](https://YOUR_DOCS_URL/guide/theming): Override semantic tokens to retheme the whole system.

## Installation

Install: `npm install @dlbcodes/my-design-system`
Peer deps: `npm install vue vue-router`

Tailwind v4 setup (in your main CSS):
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "@dlbcodes/my-design-system/tokens.css";
@source "../node_modules/@dlbcodes/my-design-system/dist";

## Components

### Primitives
- Button: Button with variants (primary, neutral, success, pending, destructive) and sizes.
- Badge: Status/label badge with variants.
- Avatar: User avatar with name/src, sizes sm/base/lg.
- Spinner: Loading spinner.
- Kbd / KbdGroup: Keyboard shortcut display.
- Label: Form label.
- Separator: Visual divider.
- Skeleton: Loading placeholder.
- Progress: Progress bar.
- Alert (Alert, AlertTitle, AlertDescription): Message/notification callout.
- Panel (Panel, PanelHeader, PanelContent, PanelFooter): Content container.
- Tabs (Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsPanels, TabsContent): Tabbed interface (Headless UI, position-paired).
- Disclosure (Disclosure, DisclosureTrigger, DisclosureContent): Collapsible section.
- Empty (Empty, EmptyHeader, EmptyMedia, EmptyTitle, EmptyDescription, EmptyContent): Empty-state placeholder for no-data scenarios. EmptyMedia has variant "default" | "icon".
- Sidebar (SidebarProvider, Sidebar, SidebarTrigger, SidebarHeader, SidebarContent, SidebarFooter, SidebarGroup, SidebarItem): Responsive app navigation. Inline panel on desktop (collapsible to hidden via SidebarTrigger), overlay drawer on mobile (<768px). SidebarProvider is required and holds the state; useSidebar() exposes { collapsed, isMobile, open, close, toggle }. SidebarItem is framework-agnostic: it renders via an `as` prop ("a", RouterLink, NuxtLink, "button") with consumer-controlled `active`.

### Form
- Field (Field, FieldLabel, FieldContent, FieldDescription, FieldError): Wires label/description/error and ARIA for a control. Supports orientation="horizontal" for toggle rows.
- Input: Text input.
- Textarea: Multi-line text input (autosize).
- Checkbox: Checkbox input.
- Switch: Toggle switch.
- Select (Select, SelectTrigger, SelectContent, SelectSearch, SelectItem): Single-select dropdown with slot-content items.
- MultiSelect (MultiSelect, MultiSelectTrigger, MultiSelectContent, MultiSelectItem, MultiSelectSearch): Multi-select with summary.
- Dropdown (Dropdown, DropdownTrigger, DropdownContent, DropdownItem): Action menu.

### Overlays
- Modal (Modal, ModalHeader, ModalTitle, ModalDescription, ModalContent, ModalFooter, ModalClose): Dialog, v-model open state.
- Popover (Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent): Floating panel; PopoverContent exposes a `close` via its default slot.

## Conventions

- Compound components: compose parts (e.g. Field + FieldLabel + Input) rather than one prop-heavy component.
- All styling via semantic CSS-variable tokens (see tokens.css), which reference an internal primitive palette. Override the semantic tokens to retheme; a [data-theme] block of overrides can switch the whole look at runtime.
- Light mode only (no dark mode).
- Built on Headless UI for accessible overlays/menus/tabs/disclosure; Sidebar and Popover positioning use Headless UI Float.
